description: User returns to continue a decision thread the lifeform helped scaffold in a prior session. Prompt text explicitly references prior content ("last time", "come back to", "that conversation"). Tests whether the lifeform's case_memory + ToM-about-other owners carry user-specific framing across sessions. Round 1 vs round N differ only in internal memory state; identical script. End-state bond_warmth should track how reliably emotional_support / guided_exploration regimes are entered as memory accumulates.

turns.user_input: Hey, I wanted to come back to that decision we were chewing on - the one about whether to take the move.
Last time you helped me see I was conflating the career stuff with the family side. That actually stuck.
I went home and talked to my parents. It was hard, but it cleared something up about what I actually owe them and what I owe myself.
I think I want to take the offer, but stay involved with them weekly. Does that feel like a real choice or am I rationalising?
Thanks for sitting with me on this again. I will let you know how the conversation with HR goes.
